name: conditional-get fetcher: a subsequent fetch sends If-Modified-Since built from the stored last_modified
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id azure --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --last-modified lastmod-xyz --body-hash h1 >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id azure --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 304
